name: Curried Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white wine, or apple juice
2 cups leftover, cooked turkey, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the raisins and wine or apple juice in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then simmer until the raisins are soft, about 5-7 minutes. Set aside to cool slightly.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the turkey with the celery and apples. Stir in the raisins and any liquid remaining in the saucepan. Toss well to combine.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, ginger, and curry powder. Toss with the turkey mixture to coat lightly and thoroughly. Season with salt as needed.
4. Chill the salad in the refrigerator until ready to serve. Serve on plates lined with an array of lettuce leaves.
